---
name: New resource proposal
about: Propose a book, article, tool, or community resource to add
title: '[New resource] '
labels: new-resource
assignees: ''

---

**Resource**
Name and URL.

**Where does it belong?**
Which file/section should list it (e.g. `English/Books/Middle.md`,
`English/Tooling.md`, `English/CommunitySources.md`)?

**Why is it worth adding?**
What does it cover that the currently listed resources do not? Personal
experience with it is a plus.

**Language(s) of the resource**
E.g. English only, or also available in Russian/Chinese.
